(LLM-FineTuning-Solutions) (base) vavkkishore@Mac-3377 YouTube-Search-ML-App % npm run app-api-web:stop > youtube-search-ml-app@1.0.0 app-api-web:stop > bash Scripts/api-web-stop.sh ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════ VidSage — Stopping Services ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════ [WARN] Backend FastAPI (uvicorn) was not running on port 8000.
